      <;>

      <;>

      <;>

  have h3 : ‖pc.S‖ * (nth_partial 1 pc.fu pbar.innerParams) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ * ‖pc.S‖ := by

        apply HasFDerivAt.fderiv
        exact h₄
      rw [h₆]
      -- Simplify the expression to match the expected form
      simp [rotproj_inner', Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      simp_all [EuclideanSpace.single, Matrix.toLin', Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_val_zero]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Matrix.toLin', Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      simp_all [Matrix.toLin', Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Matrix.toLin', Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]
      <;>
      norm_num
    rw [h₃]
  rw [h₂]
  have h₃ : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have h₄ : 0 < ‖pc.S‖ := pc.norm_S_gt_zero
    linarith
  field_simp [h₃]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  simp_all [Matrix.toLin', Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]
  <;>
  norm_num
  <;>
  linarith

have h₁ : (pc.fu) = (fun x => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) := rfl
  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : (nth_partial 1 (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams) =
      (deriv (fun (x : ℝ) => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x })) 0) := by
    simp [nth_partial, partial_deriv, deriv]
    <;>
    (try simp_all) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try field_simp) <;>
    (try simp_all [Pi.one_apply]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp_def]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.val_zero]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.val_one])
    <;>
    simp_all [HasDerivAt.deriv]
    <;>
    aesop
  rw [h₂]
  have h₃ : (deriv (fun (x : ℝ) => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x })) 0) =
      ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h₄ : HasDerivAt (fun (x : ℝ) => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x })) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) 0 := by
      have h₅ : HasDerivAt (fun (x : ℝ) => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x })) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) 0 := by
        -- Use the fact that the derivative of the rotation matrix with respect to θ is given
        have h₅₁ : HasDerivAt (fun (x : ℝ) => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x }))) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) 0 := by
          -- Use the chain rule and the fact that the derivative of the rotation matrix is known
          have h₅₂ : HasDerivAt (fun (x : ℝ) => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x }))) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) 0 := by
            simp [rotproj_inner_unit, rotprojRM]
            have h₅₃ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => _root_.rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.y) (pbar.innerParams.z) (pbar.innerParams.x + x) pc.S) (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S)) 0 := by
              -- Derivative of the rotation matrix with respect to θ
              have h₅₄ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S) * x + (pbar.rotM₁ pc.S)) (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S) 0 := by
                simpa using ((hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ)).const_mul (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S)).add_const (pbar.rotM₁ pc.S)
              -- The derivative of the rotation matrix is pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S
              have h₅₅ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => _root_.rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.y) (pbar.innerParams.z) (pbar.innerParams.x + x) pc.S) (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S)) 0 := by
                -- Use the fact that the derivative of the rotation matrix is pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S)
                have h₅₆ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => _root_.rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.y) (pbar.innerParams.z) (pbar.innerParams.x + x) pc.S) (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S)) 0 := by
                  -- Prove this by using the properties of rotation matrices and their derivatives
                  convert HasDerivAt.comp (0 : ℝ) (hasDerivAt_inv (by
                    -- Show that the matrix is invertible
                    have h₅₇ : _root_.rotprojM (pbar.innerParams.y) (pbar.innerParams.z) (pbar.innerParams.x) ≠ 0 := by
                      norm_num [Matrix.det_fin_three]
                      <;>
                      simp_all [pbar, _root_.rotprojM]
                      <;>
                      norm_num
                      <;>
                      aesop
                    simp_all [Matrix.det_fin_three]
                    <;>
                    norm_num
                    <;>
                    aesop
                  )) (h₅₄) using 1 <;>
                  simp [pbar, _root_.rotprojM, Matrix.mul_assoc]
                  <;>
                  field_simp [Matrix.det_fin_three]
                  <;>
                  ring_nf
                  <;>
                  simp_all [Matrix.det_fin_three]
                  <;>
                  norm_num
                  <;>
                  aesop
                exact h₅₆
              exact h₅₅
            have h₅₇ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => ⟪_root_.rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.y) (pbar.innerParams.z) (pbar.innerParams.x + x) pc.S, pc.w⟫) (⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) 0 := by
              -- Use the fact that the derivative of the dot product is the dot product of the derivative
              convert h₅₃.inner_hasDerivAt (hasDerivAt_const 0 (pc.w)) using 1 <;>
                simp [Matrix.mul_assoc]
              <;>
              ring_nf
              <;>
              simp_all [pbar, _root_.rotprojM, Matrix.mul_assoc]
              <;>
              norm_num
              <;>
              aesop
            have h₅₈ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => ⟪_root_.rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.y) (pbar.innerParams.z) (pbar.innerParams.x + x) pc.S, pc.w⟫ / ‖pc.S‖) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) 0 := by
              convert h₅₇.div_const (‖pc.S‖) using 1 <;>
                field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero]
              <;>
              ring_nf
              <;>
              simp_all [pbar, _root_.rotprojM, Matrix.mul_assoc]
              <;>
              norm_num
              <;>
              aesop
            convert h₅₈ using 1 <;>
              simp [rotproj_inner_unit] <;>
                ring_nf <;>
                  simp_all [pbar, _root_.rotprojM, Matrix.mul_assoc] <;>
                    norm_num <;>
                      aesop
          exact h₅₂
        exact h₅₁
      exact h₅
    have h₆ : deriv (fun (x : ℝ) => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (pbar.innerParams.with { x := x })) 0 = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.deriv
      exact h₄
    rw [h₆]
  rw [h₃]
  have h₄ : ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h₅ : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := by
      have h₅₁ : 0 < ‖pc.S‖ := pc.norm_S_gt_zero
      linarith
    field_simp [h₅]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [pbar, _root_.rotprojM, Matrix.mul_assoc]
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    aesop
  linarith

have h1 : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 1 pc.fu pbar.innerParams = ‖pc.S‖ * (nth_partial 1 (fun x => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams) := by
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu]
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : (nth_partial 1 (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams) =
    (deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams).1 := by
    simp [nth_partial, Function.comp]
    <;>
    rfl
  rw [h2]
  have h3 : (deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams) =
    deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams := by
    simp [rotproj_inner_unit]
  rw [h3]
  have h4 : deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams =
    deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams / ‖pc.S‖ := by
    have h₅ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) / ‖pc.S‖) (deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams := by
      have h₆ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) (deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams) pbar.innerParams := by
        apply DifferentiableAt.hasDerivAt
        have h₇ : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams := by
          -- Prove that the function is differentiable at the point
          apply DifferentiableAt.comp pbar.innerParams
          · -- Show that the inner product is differentiable
            apply Differentiable.differentiableAt
            exact Differentiable.inner ℝ (Differentiable.rotprojRM pc.S) (by fun_prop)
          · -- Show that the function is differentiable
            have h₈ : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (x : ℝ³)) := by
              apply differentiable_id
            exact h₈.differentiableAt
        exact h₇
      -- Apply the constant multiple rule for derivatives
      have h₉ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) / ‖pc.S‖) (deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams := by
        convert h₆.div_const ‖pc.S‖ using 1 <;>
          simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;>
          field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero] <;>
          ring
      exact h₉
    -- Conclude the proof by uniqueness of the derivative
    have h₁₀ : deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams = deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams / ‖pc.S‖ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.deriv
      exact h₅
    exact h₁₀
  rw [h4]
  have h5 : deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams = (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w).toFun := by
    have h6 : deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams = (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w).toFun := by
      have h7 : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by
        apply HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner
      have h8 : deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x)) pbar.innerParams = (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w).toFun := by
        apply HasFDerivAt.deriv
        exact h7
      exact h8
    exact h6
  rw [h5]
  simp [rotproj_inner']
  <;>
  simp_all [LinearMap.dualMap_apply, LinearMap.square, LinearMap.mulVec, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
  <;>
  field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  simp_all [real_inner_eq_sum]
  <;>
  norm_num
  <;>
  linarith

have hS : ‖pc.S‖ > 0 := by
    exact GlobalTheoremPrecondition.norm_S_gt_zero pc
  have h₁ : HasFDerivAt (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) (rotproj_inner'_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by
    sorry
  have h₂ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 1 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    sorry
  calc
    ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 1 pc.fu pbar.innerParams
      = ‖pc.S‖ * (deriv (fun x : ℝ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0) := by
        simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu]
      _ = ‖pc.S‖ * (deriv (fun x : ℝ => (1 / ‖pc.S‖) * rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0) := by
        simp [rotproj_inner_unit, Finset.coe_sort]
        <;> field_simp [hS.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [hS.ne']
        <;> linarith
      _ = ‖pc.S‖ * ((1 / ‖pc.S‖) * deriv (fun x : ℝ => rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0) := by
        have h₃ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => (1 / ‖pc.S‖ : ℝ) * rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0 = (1 / ‖pc.S‖ : ℝ) * deriv (fun x : ℝ => rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0 := by
          apply deriv_const_mul
        rw [h₃]
      _ = deriv (fun x : ℝ => rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0 := by
        field_simp [hS.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [hS.ne']
        <;> linarith
      _ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
        have h₃ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w (x • pbar.innerParams)) 0 = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
          sorry
        rw [h₃]
      _ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by rfl

have h1 : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 1 pc.fu pbar.innerParams =
      ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by sorry
  sorry

simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu]
  have h1 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0) pc.S, pc.w⟫) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams := by
    -- Prove that the function is differentiable at pbar.innerParams
    apply DifferentiableAt.div_const
    have h2 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => ⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0) pc.S, pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams := by
      -- Use the fact that the projection and rotation functions are differentiable
      have h3 : ContinuousLinearMap ℝ ℝ³ (ℝ²) := pbar.proj_xyL
      have h4 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0)) pbar.innerParams := by
        -- Prove that the rotation function is differentiable at pbar.innerParams
        have h5 : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0)) := by
          unfolded
          apply Differentiable
          <;> fun_prop
          <;> continuous
          <;> (try decide)
          <;> (try aesop)
        exact h5.differentiableAt
      -- Compose the differentiable functions
      have h6 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0))) pbar.innerParams := by
        apply DifferentiableAt.comp _ h4 h3.continuousLinearMap.differentiableAt
      -- Compute the inner product
      have h7 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => ⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0) pc.S, pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams := by
        apply DifferentiableAt.inner _ _ (h6) (differentiableAt_const _)
        <;> norm_num
        <;> (try aesop)
        <;> (try simp_all [inner_product_space])
        <;> (try norm_num)
        <;> (try aesop)
      exact h7
    exact h2
  -- Compute the partial derivative
  have h2 : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.rotRM x.1 x.2 x.0) pc.S, pc.w⟫) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 1 1)
    = (⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.differentiated_rotation pbar.innerParams.1 pbar.innerParams.2 pbar.innerParams.0 |>.snd), pc.S⟫) / ‖pc.S‖ := by
    sorry
  have h3 : (⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.differentiated_rotation pbar.innerParams.1 pbar.innerParams.2 pbar.innerParams.0 |>.snd), pc.S⟫) / ‖pc.S‖ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ / ‖pc.S‖ := by
    sorry
  have h4 : ‖pc.S‖ * ( (⟪pbar.proj_xyL (pbar.differentiated_rotation pbar.innerParams.1 pbar.innerParams.2 pbar.innerParams.0 |>.snd), pc.S⟫) / ‖pc.S‖ ) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    sorry
  simp_all [h2, h3, h4]
  <;> field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero]
  <;> ring
  <;> simp_all [inner_product_space, inner]
  <;> norm_num
  <;> aesop
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:

have h : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 1 pc.fu pbar.innerParams = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by sorry
  exact h

have := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, Fin.isValue]
  <;>
    simp_all [rotproj_inner_unit, rotprojRM, norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, real_inner,
      Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_zero]
  <;>
    field_simp [hasDerivAt_pow, hasDerivAt_id, mul_comm]
  <;>
    ring_nf at *
  <;>
    norm_num at *
  <;>
    simp_all [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
  <;>
    norm_num
  <;>
    linarith

have :=.pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, Fin.isValue] at *
  <;> simp_all [rotproj_inner_unit, rotprojRM, inner, Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ,
    Fin.sum_univ_zero, mul_comm]
  <;> field_simp [*, ‖pc.S‖] at *
  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero]
  <;> linarith

have h1 : Differentiable ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) := by
    have h : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (x 0 : ℝ)) := differentiable_fst
    have h₂ : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (x 1 : ℝ)) := differentiable_fst
    have h₃ : Differentiable ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (x 2 : ℝ)) := differentiable_fst
    sorry
  
  have h2 : HasFDerivAt (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) pbar.innerParams := by
    have h2 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by
      apply differentiableAt_of_differentiable
      exact h1
    exact h2.hasFDerivAt
  
  have h3 : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 1 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    sorry
  
  have h4 : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 1 pc.fu pbar.innerParams = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁θ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    sorry
  
  exact h4
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:
